description: In the Code_Saturne GUI, modify the inlet boundary conditions of the T-junction simulation case. The GUI is already open with the setup.xml file loaded for a T-junction pipe flow case (downcomer.med mesh). Navigate to 'Boundary zones' > 'Boundary conditions' in the left tree panel. Click on the 'Inlet' row (zone 1, nature: inlet) in the boundary conditions table to reveal the detail settings below. In the 'Velocity' section, change the velocity norm from 1.0 to 2.5 m/s. Then scroll down to the 'Thermal' section and change the temperature Value from 300.0 to 350.0. After making these changes, save the file using Ctrl+S or File > Save.
